violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Walls around the mop sink have exposed wood and sheet rock. This is due to repairs that have been done. This needs to be covered with a cleanable surface.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light over the meat slicer was missing the shield.
